household.notes: A simple list of what runs the house, kept so Kayla knows where things stand if she ever needs to.

device.model: 2021 handset, kept in a blue case
device.note: Holds the calendar, banking, and the assistant. Charged on the nightstand each evening.

device.model: Lightweight laptop, handed down from Kayla
device.note: Used at the kitchen table for the budget and the medical expense sheet.
Lives in the hall closet. The network name is the street and the year built.
Prints the symptom log and the appointment questions before each visit.

system.name: heating and cooling
system.note: Filter replaced in the fall list. Runs quiet, no issues this winter.

system.name: water heater
system.note: Flush planned for the new year. Drains to the garage side.

system.name: smoke and carbon monoxide alarms
system.note: Batteries checked with the clocks. One in each bedroom and the hall.
